---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for a new zero-dependency validation rule
title: "feat: [Short description of the feature]"
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""
---

### Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when I need to validate [X] without adding heavy libraries..."

### Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Please include an example of how the chained API would look:

```typescript
checkSomething(input).newMethod().execute();
```

# Describe alternatives you've considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or regex patterns you've considered.

Would you be willing to submit a Pull Request?

- [ ] Yes!
- [ ] No, just suggesting it.
